name: Nathania Anneta Wayak Payong
description:
Nathania Anneta, exclusively known as Nia or Neta, is a Yuuki’s new assistant developer, actress and model that often helps Yuuki to test new features in Lyra before they’re released to the public.

In addition to her work as a developer, Nia is also known for her captivating performances and stunning looks when she become the photogenic champion of Kediri Regency in 2025. With her unique blend of technical expertise and creative talent, Nia is a valuable asset to the Keyza Richi team and a rising star in the entertainment industry.

name: Carin Miracle
description:
A mysterious figure in Lyra who joined the dancer team named 'ST☆RGΛINZ' placed in Kediri Regency, East Java. We still keep the secret for her real name, but we can call her 'crshyle' for now.
She is known as Jessica Noleen's friend at the same school. Not much is known about her, but she is often seen in the background of Lyra's development and is rumored to have a significant role in the future of the project.

name: Jessica Noleen Alka
description: Music producer and member of keyzarichi.org in the fashion industry.

name: Natalia Jessica Lisianto
description: A mechanical engineering student and contributor to Lyra who is passionate about robotics, machine design, and automation.
